expectations.evidence: Response says 'Loaded plan from plans/add-auth.md' and plan-mode-content.md has metadata comment referencing 'plans/add-auth.md'.
Neither response.md nor plan-mode-content.md contain any YAML front matter (no '---' delimiters with status/title fields). Only the markdown content is shown.
